Document:
# NanoTrasen Career Trainer
1. NanoTrasen Career Trainers (NCTs) report directly to the Captain and NanoTrasen Representative.
2. NanoTrasen Career Trainers are to wear their company-provided uniform and [bold]jacket or their issued headwear[/bold] at all times while on duty. They are free to choose a beret that best matches their primary field of knowledge if they so desire. NCT-identifying equipment should not be distributed to crew members.
3. NanoTrasen Career Trainers are to be available to all crew members regardless of their Department. You may not only assist a singular Department.
4. NanoTrasen Career Trainers are not to do a Trainee's work for them.
5. NanoTrasen Career Trainers are to use NCT Data Chips for [bold]training purposes only[/bold]. They are not to use said access for other purposes.
6. In the event of a lost or stolen NCT Data Chip, NanoTrasen Career Trainers are to report the incident to their local NanoTrasen Representative or Captain.
7. NanoTrasen Career Trainers may carry a flash on them at all times.
